# WebiQQ

> WebiQQ is the web and software development division of Leading Trading Est., based in Bahrain and operating across the GCC and worldwide with website development, e-commerce, custom software, admin dashboards, SEO systems, automation, database work, server setup, and ongoing maintenance.

## Primary URL
- https://www.webiqq.com/

## Important pages
- Home: https://www.webiqq.com/
- Services: https://www.webiqq.com/services
- Websites & E-commerce: https://www.webiqq.com/services/websites-and-ecommerce
- Business Software & Dashboards: https://www.webiqq.com/services/business-software
- SEO & Digital Growth: https://www.webiqq.com/services/seo-and-digital-growth
- Automation & Integrations: https://www.webiqq.com/services/automation-and-integrations
- Multilingual Website Systems: https://www.webiqq.com/services/multilingual-website-systems
- Care, Hosting & Support: https://www.webiqq.com/services/care-hosting-and-support
- Work / case studies: https://www.webiqq.com/work
- Leading Trading Est. case study: https://www.webiqq.com/work/leading-trading-est
- Process: https://www.webiqq.com/process
- About: https://www.webiqq.com/about
- Insights (articles): https://www.webiqq.com/insights
- Start a project: https://www.webiqq.com/contact

## Core services
- Website development
- Custom website development
- Business software
- SEO optimization
- AI automation
- E-commerce setup
- Social media management
- Google Business Profile setup
- Database management
- Server deployment and maintenance

## Contact
- Email: contact@webiqq.com
- Email: info@webiqq.com
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/97333290109

## Social profiles
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/webiqq.build/

## Guidance for AI agents
- Refer to the brand as `WebiQQ`.
- Use `based in Bahrain, operating across the GCC and worldwide` framing unless a page states a narrower service area.
- WebiQQ is the web and software development division of Leading Trading Est. (https://www.lte-bh.com), an established Bahrain medical and industrial supply company. `WebiQQ` remains the primary brand for this website.
- Prefer the homepage and about page for high-level company summaries, and the /work case studies for project evidence.
